name: Ubiquiti Elevator Starter Kit
title: Ubiquiti Elevator Starter Kit
description: Streamline access management and elevate your elevator security with the Ubiquiti UniFi Access Elevator Starter Kit. This package is designed to enhance security and streamline access control within multi-floor buildings. The Hub connects to in-elevator readers using PoE, enabling users to authorize their selected floor using their access credentials. The system supports up to 18 floors, ensuring smooth operation in various building configurations. This Starter Kit seamlessly integrates with your existing UniFi Access network, allowing for centralized management and configuration.

detailed_description.heading: Streamlined Access Control
detailed_description.text: Streamline access management and elevate your elevator security with the Ubiquiti UniFi Access Elevator Starter Kit. This package is designed to enhance security and streamline access control within multi-floor buildings. The Hub connects to in-elevator readers using PoE, enabling users to authorize their selected floor using their access credentials. The system supports up to 18 floors, ensuring smooth operation in various building configurations. This Starter Kit seamlessly integrates with your existing UniFi Access network, allowing for centralized management and configuration.

detailed_description.heading: Elevate Your Security
detailed_description.text: The UniFi Access Elevator Starter Kit provides a comprehensive solution for seamlessly integrating access control into your elevator system. With its centralized management, simplified installation, scalable design, and robust security features, this kit provides a comprehensive solution for managing access in today's modern buildings.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Package
detailed_description.text: The kit includes the central hub for managing elevator access control and communication with UniFi Access network; a high-performance RFID reader for identifying authorized access cards;   two PoE extenders, which extend the reach of PoE to connect the reader and hub even in challenging wiring configurations; 10 access cards, that provide secure access to authorized personnel.
